top_signals.title: Taiwan suspects Nvidia chips smuggled to China via Japan
top_signals.summary: Japan is one of many locations in Asia where Chinese companies access American AI chips — by renting hardware that's owned by foreign firms and installed in overseas data centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chip stocks race towards biggest gains since dotcom era on AI demand
top_signals.summary: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index rides Big Tech’s data centre spending spree to 75% gains in 2026
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US troops are reportedly being targeted using location data, Pentagon says
top_signals.summary: U.S. forces deployed to war zones have been targeted using commercially available location data, according to reports fielded by military officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran strikes, Snowflake soars, Robinhood's new AI tools and more in Morning Squawk
top_signals.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Traders' hopes fade for U.S.-Iran nuclear deal this year despite report on potential ceasefire agreement
top_signals.summary: Chances of a nuclear deal between the U.S. and Iran this year haven't moved much on prediction markets after Axios reported that the two agreed to a ceasefire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oura is launching its smallest smart ring yet, shrinking wearable design by 40%
top_signals.summary: Oura, the smart ring maker, is set to launch what it says will be the smallest smart ring available in the growing wearables market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Romanian national sentenced to more than 4 years for hacking Oregon government systems
top_signals.summary: Dragomir was arrested in Romania in November 2024 and brought to the U.S. last year to face charges for hacking into the network belonging to Oregon’s Office of Emergency Management.
